title: Knowledge Graph Systems Index
description: Schema for the Conker: Live & Uncut GAMEMODE.ai knowledge graph index. This JSON file enumerates systems, tools, docs, and prompts with their node IDs, file paths, and relationships.

version.description: Semantic version of the index format (e.g., "1.0.0").

nodes.description: List of knowledge graph nodes across systems, tools, docs, and prompts.

EngineKind.description: Engine or runtime associated with this node (if applicable).

Node.description: Single knowledge graph node describing a system, tool, document, or prompt.

description.description: Short description of the node’s purpose.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and routing (e.g., "Heist", "Multiplayer", "UE5").

engines.description: Engines or runtimes this node is associated with, if applicable.

languages.description: Implementation languages used by this node (e.g., "C++", "Rust", "Lua", "Markdown").

files.description: File paths in the repository that implement or define this node.

related_nodes.description: Other node IDs directly related to this node (dependencies, docs, prompts).

primary.description: Whether this node is a primary entry point for its subsystem (true) or a supporting node (false).

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata for advanced routing and analysis (e.g., difficulty, stability, test coverage).
